parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  c.account_id,
  c.account_name,
  c.from_date,
  c.churn_reason,
  c.churn_reason_modified,
  c.customer_churn_reason,
  c.churn_type,
  c.csm,
  c.avg_mrr,
  c.account_segmentation,
  c.geo_area,
  c.months_in_guesty,
  c.etf
FROM `guesty-data.csm.csm_churn_report` c
WHERE c.from_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
ORDER BY c.from_date DESC
LIMIT 100

parameters.query: ={{ 'SELECT Id, Name, Owner.Name, Guesty_Admin_ID__c FROM Account WHERE Guesty_Admin_ID__c IN (' + $json.accountIds + ')' }}
